# Pull Request Title

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the changes made in this pull request. Explain the problem being solved or the feature being added. If this PR is fixing a bug, reference the issue number. If it's a feature or improvement, describe its purpose and how it will be used.

For example:
- **Fix**: Corrected an issue with user login causing a crash when submitting empty forms.
- **Feature**: Added an API endpoint for user authentication using OAuth.

## Related Issue
Link to the related GitHub issue(s) this PR addresses. For example:
- Fixes #123
- Closes #456

## Type of Change
Please mark the relevant checkboxes:
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Other (Please specify)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Explain the testing steps taken to verify that your changes work as expected:
- Unit tests
- Manual testing
- Integration tests

Include screenshots if relevant.

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have run tests locally and they are passing
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested my changes on relevant platforms
- [ ] I have reviewed the code for security vulnerabilities

## Additional Notes
Add any other context or information here that might be relevant for reviewers, such as known issues, or any dependencies that need to be addressed before merging.

---

### Reviewers:
- @username (Add relevant reviewers here)
